languages.text: {n}Янрис делает крошечный шаг назад, почти незаметный для столь тучного человека.{/n} "Как видите, Ваша Светлость, неприятная ситуация разрешилась в полном соответствии с интересами династии. Я желал бы откланяться. Не менее важные вопросы ожидают решения".

traits.locale_text: {n}Янрис делает крошечный шаг назад, почти незаметный для столь тучного человека.{/n} "Как видите, Ваша Светлость, сия конъюнктура разрешилась в полном соответствии с интересами династии. Я желал бы откланяться. Не менее важные вопросы ожидают апробации".
traits.speaker: HighFactotum

languages.text: {n}Janris takes a tiny step backward, a motion almost imperceptible for a man of his girth.{/n} "As you can see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the unpleasant situation has been resolved in full accordance with the dynasty's interests. I should like to take my leave. Matters of no less importance await my attention."
languages.original_text: {n}Янрис делает крошечный шаг назад, почти незаметный для столь тучного человека.{/n} "Как видите, Ваша Светлость, неприятная ситуация разрешилась в полном соответствии с интересами династии. Я желал бы откланяться. Не менее важные вопросы ожидают решения".

I should like to take my leave. Matters of no less importance await my attention."

languages.text: {n}Janris da un pequeño paso atrás, un movimiento casi imperceptible en un hombre de su talla.{/n} «Como puede ver, mi{mf|lord|lady}, la desagradable situación se ha resuelto en su totalidad y conforme a los intereses de la dinastía. Ahora debo retirarme; otros asuntos no menos importantes requieren de mi atención».
languages.original_text: {n}Janris takes a tiny step backward, a motion almost imperceptible for a man of his girth.{/n} "As you can see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the unpleasant situation has been resolved in full accordance with the dynasty's interests. I should like to take my leave. Matters of no less importance await my attention."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janris da un pequeño paso atrás, un movimiento casi imperceptible en un hombre de su talla.{/n} «Como puede ver, mi{mf|lord|lady}, la desagradable situación se ha resuelto en su totalidad y conforme a los intereses de la dinastía. Ahora debo retirarme; otros asuntos no menos importantes requieren de mi atención».

languages.text: {n}詹里斯向后退了极小的一步，对他那臃肿的身形来说，那动作几乎难以察觉。{/n}“如您所见，大人，这令人不快的事件已完全依照王朝利益得到妥善处理。请允许我先行告退，还有不少同样重要的事务，等着我去处理。”
languages.original_text: {n}Janris takes a tiny step backward, a motion almost imperceptible for a man of his girth.{/n} "As you can see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the unpleasant situation has been resolved in full accordance with the dynasty's interests. I should like to take my leave. Matters of no less importance await my attention."

traits.locale_text: {n}詹里斯向后退了极小的一步，对他那臃肿的身形来说，那动作几乎难以察觉。{/n}“如您所见，大人，这令人不快的事件已完全依照王朝利益得到妥善处理。请允许我先行告退，还有不少同样重要的事务，等着我去处理。”

languages.text: {n}Janris recule très légèrement, un geste presque imperceptible pour un homme de sa stature.{/n} « Comme vous pouvez le constater, Votre Seigneurie, le problème a été réglé conformément aux intérêts de la dynastie. Sur ce, je dois prendre congé. Des affaires tout aussi importantes requièrent mon attention. »
languages.original_text: {n}Janris takes a tiny step backward, a motion almost imperceptible for a man of his girth.{/n} "As you can see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the unpleasant situation has been resolved in full accordance with the dynasty's interests. I should like to take my leave. Matters of no less importance await my attention."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janris recule très légèrement, un geste presque imperceptible pour un homme de sa stature.{/n} « Comme vous pouvez le constater, Votre Seigneurie, le problème a été réglé conformément aux intérêts de la dynastie. Sur ce, je dois prendre congé. Des affaires tout aussi importantes requièrent mon attention. »

languages.text: {n}Janris, onun cüssesindeki bir adam için neredeyse fark edilemeyecek kadar küçük bir adım geriye atıyor.{/n} "Gördüğünüz gibi {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, bu nahoş durum hanedanlığın çıkarlarına tamamen uygun bir şekilde çözüme kavuşturuldu. Müsaadenizi isteyeyim. En az bunun kadar önemli başka meseleler ilgimi bekliyor."
languages.original_text: {n}Janris takes a tiny step backward, a motion almost imperceptible for a man of his girth.{/n} "As you can see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the unpleasant situation has been resolved in full accordance with the dynasty's interests. I should like to take my leave. Matters of no less importance await my attention."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janris, onun cüssesindeki bir adam için neredeyse fark edilemeyecek kadar küçük bir adım geriye atıyor.{/n} "Gördüğünüz gibi {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, bu nahoş durum hanedanlığın çıkarlarına tamamen uygun bir şekilde çözüme kavuşturuldu. Müsaadenizi isteyeyim. En az bunun kadar önemli başka meseleler ilgimi bekliyor."

languages.text: {n}ジャンリスはわずかな後退をとり、その動きは彼の体格ではほとんど気づかれなかった。{/n} 「ご覧の通り、{mf|閣下|閣下}、不快な状況は王朝にとって都合の良いように解決されました。失礼いたします。私にも重要な事柄が待っております。」
languages.original_text: {n}Janris takes a tiny step backward, a motion almost imperceptible for a man of his girth.{/n} "As you can see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the unpleasant situation has been resolved in full accordance with the dynasty's interests. I should like to take my leave. Matters of no less importance await my attention."

traits.locale_text: {n}ジャンリスはわずかな後退をとり、その動きは彼の体格ではほとんど気づかれなかった。{/n} 「ご覧の通り、{mf|閣下|閣下}、不快な状況は王朝にとって都合の良いように解決されました。失礼いたします。私にも重要な事柄が待っております。」

languages.text: {n}Janris weicht einen winzigen Schritt zurück, eine fast unmerkliche Bewegung für einen fülligen Mann wie ihn.{/n} "Wie Ihr sehen könnt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, wurde die unerfreuliche Situation im Einklang mit den Interessen der Dynastie geklärt. Ich würde mich dann verabschieden. Weniger wichtige Angelegenheiten bedürfen meiner Aufmerksamkeit."
languages.original_text: {n}Janris takes a tiny step backward, a motion almost imperceptible for a man of his girth.{/n} "As you can see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the unpleasant situation has been resolved in full accordance with the dynasty's interests. I should like to take my leave. Matters of no less importance await my attention."
